title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is a browser-based AI video generation tool focused on solving character consistency in AI-generated films. The platform offers storyboard mode to lock character appearance across scenes, multi-shot generation with camera presets, a 15-second shot extender, and built-in timeline editing for final assembly without external software.
